content_body:
Geocaching is an adventure game for GPS users, who can use the location coordinates given online to find the caches.

You will find a treasure or visitor log in the caches and are asked to leave a little fascinating something for the next visitors.

Type in our zip code, 30513, to find the local caches and begin your treasure hunt!

You will hike some great paths that are off the beaten trail around Blue Ridge, and learn about some fascinating history where some caches are located.

A fun adventure for families!
title: Geocaching
